name: In New York, can they slap AEO on all my docs?
description: **Sanctionable in NY** - recent Google case proves it.[1]

mainEntity.name: In New York, can they slap AEO on all my docs?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Sanctionable in NY** - recent Google case proves it.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, New York courts sanction overuse of AEO as a litigation tactic.**[1]

Recent ruling hit Google for inappropriate mass designations on non-sensitive content.[1]

- **Sparingly**: Court rule mandates minimal use.[1]
- **Tactical abuse**: Reviews, trickle de-designations flag issues.[1]
- **All designations**: Overuse of any confidentiality risky.[1]

Demand justification per doc; motion if refused. NY litigators know this precedent.
